# TextWizard

> Free, privacy-first text and code tools that run entirely in your browser. No uploads, no accounts, no backend — your text never leaves your device. Open source (MIT), built with Astro, hosted on Cloudflare Pages.

TextWizard is a collection of fast, single-purpose web utilities for working with text and code. Every tool runs client-side in the browser; nothing is sent to a server. Each tool has its own page, and its source is a single file linked from the site.

## Tools

- [Text Tools](https://textwizard.us/tools/text-tools): Trim whitespace, dedupe and sort lines, change case, wrap/unwrap, strip HTML/ANSI, find & replace.
- [Case Converter](https://textwizard.us/tools/case-converter): UPPER, lower, Title, Sentence, camelCase, snake_case, kebab-case.
- [Fancy Text](https://textwizard.us/tools/fancy-text): Unicode bold, italic, script, fraktur, monospace, circled, small caps, upside down, and Zalgo.
- [Code & Data](https://textwizard.us/tools/code-data): Base64/URL/hex, JSON format & convert, CSV↔JSON, XML pretty-print, regex tester, SHA hashes, timestamps, color conversion.
- [Translators](https://textwizard.us/tools/translators): NATO phonetic alphabet, "A as in Apple" spelling, Pig Latin, phone keypad.
- [Analyzers](https://textwizard.us/tools/analyzers): Character, word, and line counts plus character-frequency analysis.
- [Diff](https://textwizard.us/tools/diff): Line-by-line comparison of two texts.
- [Generators](https://textwizard.us/tools/generators): UUIDs, passwords, random numbers/dates/IPs, hex colors, Lorem ipsum.
- [QR Code](https://textwizard.us/tools/qr-code): QR code from any URL or text with an optional centered logo, downloadable as PNG.
- [Emoji Copy](https://textwizard.us/tools/emoji): Browse and click-to-copy every Unicode emoji.

## Docs

- [Docs](https://textwizard.us/docs): How the tools work and how to use them.
- [Privacy Policy](https://textwizard.us/privacy): What we collect (nothing) and why.
- [Terms of Use](https://textwizard.us/terms): Terms for using the site.
